mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling or held unusually low, discount rates ease and equity valuation multiples expand, so S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days are positive. The signal fails if rate cuts do not coincide with stronger 20-day returns than unchanged or rising rates.
failure_condition: Rejected if triggered low-rate or falling-rate windows do not show higher 20d SPX returns than non-easing windows, or if the sign of the return effect is negative for two consecutive rolling 12-month samples.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE over the last few months signals weakening household income and demand, which depresses corporate revenue expectations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days. The effect should be visible when unemployment is trending up rather than merely level-high.
failure_condition: Rejected if 20d forward SPX returns are positive in a majority of unemployment-rise triggers, or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional mean by at least 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth together with rising payrolls indicates broad final-demand momentum, which supports near-term earnings revisions and lifts S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal is strongest when both consumer spending and labor demand improve together, not when only one series improves.
failure_condition: Rejected if joint improvements in RSAFS and PAYEMS do not outperform single-series cases, or if triggered joint-strength episodes fail to produce positive median 20d SPX returns over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO rises while CPIAUCSL is flat or falling, real activity is improving without an inflation shock, which supports margins and lowers policy pressure, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days. The mechanism fails if higher industrial production is accompanied by accelerating inflation.
failure_condition: Rejected if periods with rising INDPRO and non-accelerating CPIAUCSL do not show positive 60d forward returns, or if the return edge disappears once CPIAUCSL accelerates above its prior 3-month pace.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in HOUST below recent levels is an early signal of demand contraction and weaker cyclical spending, which should translate into negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days. The effect is expected to appear quickly because housing data are sensitive to business-cycle turning points.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 6-month moving average by more than 10%
failure_condition: Rejected if sub-mean housing starts episodes are followed by positive 5d SPX returns more often than negative returns, or if the sign effect is absent in two or more consecutive quarter samples.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is above a restrictive threshold and CPIAUCSL is still elevated, the market should price continued policy restraint and higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days. The signal depends on inflation remaining sticky; if inflation is falling rapidly, the effect weakens.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 4.5% and CPIAUCSL above its 6-month average
failure_condition: Rejected if restrictive-rate and elevated-inflation episodes fail to produce below-average 20d SPX returns, or if the conditional hit rate is not materially worse than 50% over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Stable or falling UNRATE combined with continued PAYEMS gains indicates labor-market resilience, supporting household spending and earnings expectations, which should generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days. The mechanism fails if payroll gains are offset by a rising unemployment rate.
failure_condition: Rejected if labor-strength episodes do not produce positive 60d SPX returns, or if the sign flips negative when UNRATE is stable but PAYEMS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of weak RSAFS and falling GDPC1 indicates broad demand erosion, leading analysts to cut revenue forecasts and pushing S&P 500 returns lower over the next 20 trading days. The signal is strongest when both measures deteriorate together, not when only one softens.
failure_condition: Rejected if joint weakness in sales and GDP does not correspond to negative 20d SPX returns, or if the conditional return distribution is indistinguishable from baseline across rolling 3-year samples.
